# Leviathan

*[Hobbes](../philosophers/hobbes.md) · 1651*

Hobbes's great treatise of political philosophy. He describes the state of nature as a 'war of every man against every man', where distrust, rivalry, and the pursuit of glory make life 'solitary, poor, nasty, brutish, and short'. To escape it, men surrender their rights to a sovereign, the Leviathan, alone able to secure peace.
